project_type: AWS CDK monorepo with TypeScript lambdas, React frontend
build_system: npm workspaces with vitest for testing, CDK for infrastructure
test_framework: vitest with aws-sdk-client-mock, CDK snapshot tests
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run build` to typecheck. 2. Run `npm test` to run all tests. 3. Run `npm run test:update-snapshots` if CDK infra changed.
snapshot_or_generated_files: CDK snapshot tests in source/infrastructure/test/ - regenerate with `npm run test:update-snapshots`
environment_constraints: No deployment possible in sandbox. Validation is build + test only.
contribution_requirements: Apache-2.0 license header on all .ts/.tsx files. Prettier enforced. Use context.env not process.env in lambdas.
key_patterns: LeaseStore abstract class with DynamoLeaseStore impl. Authorization uses 3 ARN extraction functions tried in sequence. Frontend uses LeaseService class. API responses use JSend format. Zod schemas for validation.
directory_structure: source/common - shared code, source/lambdas - lambda handlers, source/infrastructure - CDK, source/frontend - React app
